nasb.text: the tent of meeting, and the ark of testimony, and the mercy seat upon it, and all the furniture of the tent,

esv.text: the tent of meeting, and the ark of the testimony, and the mercy seat that is on it, and all the furnishings of the tent,

cnv.text: 就是會幕、法櫃和櫃上的施恩座，以及會幕中一切的器具、

ccb.text: 即会幕、约柜和约柜上面的施恩座、会幕里面所有的器具、
